# tms-measurement-app

> Open-source, offline Android app for Beam F3 targeting in transcranial magnetic stimulation (TMS). Calculate F3 site distances from head measurements — privacy-first, no data collection.

## Project

- [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/cocodedk/tms-measurement-app)
- [Website](https://cocodedk.github.io/tms-measurement-app/)
- [Download](https://github.com/cocodedk/tms-measurement-app/releases/latest/download/TMSMeasurement.apk)
- [Author](https://cocode.dk)

## Source

- [App module](https://github.com/cocodedk/tms-measurement-app/tree/main/app)
- [README](https://github.com/cocodedk/tms-measurement-app/blob/main/README.md)
- [CLAUDE.md](https://github.com/cocodedk/tms-measurement-app/blob/main/CLAUDE.md)

## Stack

- Kotlin, Jetpack Compose, Android SDK 36
- Room database, Gradle build system
- Fully offline — no network access, no data collection
